name: Message Linter
description: Suppresses automatic URL embeds in messages by wrapping Markdown link URLs in angle brackets.

zhtw.description: Simplified Chinese to Taiwan Traditional Chinese conversion. Boolean values are kept for backward compatibility; object values configure planned ZH-TW subfeatures.

enabled.description: Enable the existing S2T conversion and contextual spelling auto-fix pipeline

profile.description: Reserved ZH-TW profile contract for future upstream parity work

relaxed.description: Reserved relaxed UI-string mode for future ZH-TW transforms

case.description: Enable proper-noun casing fixes such as GitHub and TypeScript

punctuation.description: Enable conservative MoE-style punctuation normalization in Chinese context

spacing.description: Enable conservative CJK-Latin/digit spacing and repeated punctuation normalization

quotes.description: Enable Taiwan quote normalization in Chinese context

kaomoji.description: Sanitize backticks around kaomoji to prevent accidental code formatting

headings.description: Normalize Markdown headings (shift down so minimum becomes H1, cap at H3)

links.description: Wrap Markdown link URLs in angle brackets to suppress Discord embeds

blockquotes.description: Ensure blockquote lines have a space after > for Discord compatibility

boldInlineCode.description: Convert `**bold**` to **`bold`** for inline bold formatting
